name: Hells Canyon Chukar Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and pat dry the Chukar breasts. Cut into 1-inch cubes.
2. Mix egg whites, salt, and cornstarch in a bowl.
3. Add the Chukar pieces to the mixture and toss to coat evenly. Refrigerate for 20-30 minutes.
4. Heat peanut oil in a wok or deep-sided saute pan over high heat.
5. Add the coated Chukar pieces and quickly stir-fry, making sure the pieces don't stick together. Cook for 3 minutes.
6. Remove the Chukar with a slotted spoon and place on a serving plate.
7. Reserve 2 tablespoons of oil in the pan. Add cashews or almonds and green onions, stirring for 1 minute.
8. Add Chinese rice wine, soy sauce, and reserved Chukar pieces to the pan. Stir for 1 minute.
9. Add snow peas and stir for an additional minute.
10. Transfer the dish immediately to a heated serving platter. Serve with rice.
